The '''gronda''' was an elephant-like animal that lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] plains.

The [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] attack of [[gronda stomp]] was named after the creature.<ref name="TeräsKäsi">{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80131|text=Unlocking the Secrets: A Guide to Role-Playing a Teräs Käsi Artist}}</ref>
